TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Sapat ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 170 buwan, 366 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 109 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 257 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 20%, Bunun 7%, Tayan 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sapat hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Sapat hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sapat hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sapat hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sapat hya' ga Maifor. tay 'llaw na Sapat hya' ga Kalala. rekisi kayal kyokay hasusyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan hmgiru lmosay spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕapat ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħamiʦ~ʨħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕapat ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕapat ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕapat ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕapat ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕapat ħjaʔ ɣa mai*or. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕapat ħjaʔ ɣa kalala. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj ħas~ɕus~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan ħmɣiru lmos~ɕaj s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Sapat ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 170 buwan, 366 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 109 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 257 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 20%, Bunun 7%, Tayan 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sapat hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Sapat hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sapat hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sapat hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sapat hya' ga Maifor. tay 'llaw na Sapat hya' ga Kalala. rekisi kayal kyokay hasusyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan hmgiru lmosay spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕapat ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħamiʦ~ʨħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕapat ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕapat ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕapat ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕapat ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕapat ħjaʔ ɣa mai*or. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕapat ħjaʔ ɣa kalala. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj ħas~ɕus~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan ħmɣiru lmos~ɕaj s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
